about.heroHeading: Hiring should be about what you can do, not who you are.
about.heroDesc: Equalhires was built on a simple belief: the best candidates are often overlooked because of unconscious bias — not a lack of skill. We built the platform to fix that.
about.storyP1: Research consistently shows that candidates with certain names, schools, or employment gaps are screened out before a recruiter ever reads their skills. This isn't malice — it's how the human brain processes information under time pressure.
about.storyP2: Equalhires was founded to change the inputs, not lecture the humans. By structurally removing names, photos, school names, and employment dates from the initial review, we give every candidate the same starting line. Since launch, we've expanded the platform with recruiter identity verification, a community trust and reporting system, two-factor authentication, and multilingual support in English, French, and Spanish.
about.storyP3: Identity is only revealed after a recruiter commits to an interview — at which point the decision has already been made on merit. Every recruiter on the platform is verified before they can post jobs, and a trust score system holds them accountable for interview cancellations and reports filed by job seekers. The result: fairer outcomes for candidates and stronger, more diverse teams for employers.
about.bullet1: Anonymous screening — name, photo, school, and company hidden until interview
about.bullet2: Recruiter identity verification and trust scoring required before job posting
about.bullet3: Duration-only work history — no employment dates that reveal age
about.bullet4: Multilingual platform — English, French (Canada), and Spanish (Mexico)
about.bullet5: Two-factor authentication and community reporting for platform integrity
about.quote: Companies using structured, anonymous hiring report 3× more diverse shortlists and measurably better retention after 12 months.
about.value1Desc: Bias prevention isn't a feature we added on — it's the entire foundation of how Equalhires works. Every decision in the product is made with equity in mind.
about.value2Desc: We tell candidates exactly what is hidden and why. We tell recruiters exactly when and how identity is revealed. No surprises, no grey areas.
about.value3Desc: Behind every application is a person who deserves a fair shot. We build for them — not just for the companies paying to hire.
about.value4Desc: Bias-free hiring shouldn't mean slow hiring. We've designed every workflow to be faster than traditional ATS tools, not slower.

footer.tagline: Skills-first hiring. Personal details revealed only when an interview is scheduled.
footer.fairerHiring: Built to make hiring fairer for everyone.

home.heroHeading: Hire Based On Skills And Experience Without Bias.
home.heroDesc: Our platform helps employers build a stronger, more qualified team by removing unconscious bias from the hiring process.
home.benefit1Desc: Names, photos, school names, and employment dates are hidden until an interview is scheduled.
home.benefit2Desc: Focus only on skills and experience. No time wasted on irrelevant candidate details.
home.benefit3Desc: Companies using anonymous hiring report 3× more diverse shortlists and fairer hiring outcomes.
home.benefit4Desc: Create a full profile and apply to unlimited jobs — completely free. No credit card required.
home.benefit5Desc: Every recruiter is identity-verified before posting jobs. A trust score system holds them accountable for cancellations and community reports.
home.benefit6Desc: Your personal details are only shared after an interview is scheduled — never before.
home.noOpenPositions: No open positions right now — check back soon.
home.anonymousNotice: Applications are reviewed anonymously — your identity stays hidden until an interview is scheduled.
home.testimonial1Quote: For the first time I felt my application was judged purely on what I can do, not who I am. Got three interviews in my first week.
home.testimonial2Quote: Our shortlists are noticeably more diverse. The masking removes split-second decisions we weren't even aware we were making.
home.testimonial3Quote: Managing candidates on behalf of clients is seamless. I can forward masked profiles and the reveal happens automatically at interview.
home.ctaHeading: Ready to hire — or be hired — fairly?
home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of job seekers and companies building fairer workplaces.
home.recruiterStep1Desc: Create a job listing and choose whether to add an assessment or keep it simple.
home.recruiterStep2Desc: Go through candidate profiles based only on skills and experience, without any personal details influencing your decision.
home.recruiterStep3Desc: Invite top candidates for an interview, and only then will their personal details be revealed.
home.seekerStep1Desc: Add your skills (with auto-suggest), work experience, education, and upload a resume. Your personal details stay hidden until an interview is scheduled.
home.seekerStep2Desc: Click any job to open the detail panel. Select your resume, add an optional cover letter, and submit. Employers see only your skills and experience — never your name or photo.
home.seekerStep3Desc: When an employer is interested, they schedule an interview and your identity is revealed. Your application snapshot is preserved so you always know exactly what was shared.
home.faq1Q: How does the anonymous hiring process work?
home.faq1A: When a candidate applies, their personal details (name, photo, school names, company names, and employment dates) are automatically hidden. Employers and contractors only see skills, experience level, and qualifications — ensuring decisions are based purely on merit.
home.faq2Q: When do candidate details get revealed?
home.faq2A: Personal details are revealed automatically the moment an interview is scheduled. This is the only trigger — no manual overrides. This ensures the hiring decision is already made before identity is known.
home.faq3Q: Can contractors use the platform on behalf of employers?
home.faq3A: Yes. Contractors have their own role and can review masked candidate profiles, forward shortlists to employer clients, and schedule interviews directly. Employers receive the shortlist without being exposed to unmasked profiles.
home.faq4Q: Is the platform free for job seekers?
home.faq4A: Yes, job seekers can create a full profile and apply to unlimited jobs at no cost. Employers and contractors are billed based on the number of active job listings.
home.faq5Q: How do I build my profile?
home.faq5A: Building your profile takes around 2 minutes. Add your professional headline, skills, work history (company names are masked automatically), education, and certifications. The more complete your profile, the higher your chances of being shortlisted. Go to your Profile page from the top navigation to get started.
home.faq6A: Before posting jobs, all recruiters must complete identity verification. This requires submitting your company name, business address, company website, and LinkedIn profile URL. Our platform runs automated checks (website reachability and email domain matching) and an admin review. Once approved, your account is unlocked for job posting. This ensures job seekers only interact with legitimate employers.
home.faq7Q: What is the recruiter trust score?
home.faq7A: Every recruiter account has a trust score (0–100) that reflects platform behaviour. Scores start at 60 for personal email addresses or 100 for verified company email domains. The score decreases when interviews are cancelled without cause, community reports are filed against the account, or suspicious activity is detected. It increases when verification is approved or reports are dismissed. Recruiters with a score below 40 have job posting automatically restricted.
home.faq8Q: What languages does the platform support?
home.faq8A: Equalhires currently supports English, French (Canada), and Spanish (Mexico). You can switch languages at any time using the language selector in the top navigation bar. Your preference is saved automatically. More languages are planned for future releases.
home.faq9A: Yes. You can enable 2FA from your account settings. We support authenticator apps (TOTP — compatible with Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, and others) and email-based one-time codes. Backup codes are generated when you set up 2FA so you can always recover access if you lose your device.
home.faq10A: When you apply to a job, an immutable copy of your profile is captured — your skills, headline, work history, education, and which resume you selected. This snapshot never changes even if you later update your profile. You can view it anytime from your Dashboard by clicking 'View Submission' next to any application. This gives you full transparency into exactly what each employer received.
home.faq11Q: What do I need before I can apply?
home.faq11A: Three things are required: (1) at least one skill added to your profile, (2) at least one work experience entry, and (3) at least one resume uploaded. If anything is missing when you click Apply, a guided checklist appears showing exactly which items are incomplete — with direct links to add each one.
